description: References to public cybersecurity sources for the SentinelBrief demo corpus. Only references are stored here; the documents themselves are NOT committed to the repository. Download them locally (outside the repo) before ingesting.
license_note: Each source is published by its respective organization under its own terms. Review and respect the publisher's license before redistributing any content.

sources.title: CERT Polska
sources.note: National CERT operated by NASK. Entry point to advisories and reports.

sources.title: CERT Polska - Aktualności (News and advisories)
sources.note: Ongoing security advisories and analyses published by CERT Polska.

sources.title: CERT Polska - Annual Report (Raport roczny)
sources.note: Yearly report on the security landscape in Poland. Download the PDF locally; do not commit it.

sources.title: NASK - National Research Institute
sources.note: Parent institute of CERT Polska; publishes cybersecurity research and reports.

sources.title: ENISA Threat Landscape
sources.note: EU-level annual threat landscape. Useful public reference; download locally before ingesting.
